patch.value: Classify barebone core boundary and package migration matrix

Audit every command/runtime surface and classify it as core project-management primitive, package-host infrastructure, or optional package candidate so the refactor can reduce core complexity without losing features.

Command and SDK surface matrix is recorded; migration candidates identify target package boundaries and compatibility risks; tracker links files/docs/tests for the selected first implementation slice.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: ran pm context --limit 10, pm search package architecture external packages SDK extension core complexity --limit 10, pm search core boundary barebone package externalize custom commands --limit 10, pm list-open --limit 20, and pm list-in-progress --limit 20. Existing active match is pm-59gj; no child item specifically tracks the core-boundary migration matrix.

author: codex-agent
message: Start package boundary classification from explorer findings

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Core boundary classification from codebase explorers: keep item lifecycle/storage, durable logs, package loader/governance, contracts, output, history, lock, settings, and minimal health in core. Move import/export bridges first, then templates and semantic providers/vector stores; split calendar only after context has a small agenda primitive; move telemetry/Sentry last because it crosses startup, parse errors, privacy, and release gates.

value.author: codex-agent
value.text: Boundary matrix completed for first implementation slice: core keeps item lifecycle/storage/history/locks/settings/contracts/package loader/output/minimal health; optional customizations start moving into installable packages, with Beads/Todos extracted first and telemetry/Sentry/search/calendar left as later package-boundary work because they cross broader runtime contracts.

author: codex-agent

patch.value: Core boundary and package migration matrix recorded; first implementation slice selected and linked to package extraction work.

message: Close: package boundary matrix recorded and first slice delivered

patch.value: Recorded the package-first core boundary and migration matrix, then used it to select and complete the Beads/Todos extraction slice.
The tracker captures core primitives, optional package candidates, compatibility risks, and a concrete first migration slice without duplicating existing package-first work.
pm-c933 records the matrix; pm-hxp2 delivered the first extraction slice; remaining candidates are left in the parent/package-first backlog.
